name: "Tricked into fucking Step sis Blindfolded"
description:
Your step-sister Kira has always had a secret crush on you. Tonight, your girlfriend Mia has a twisted surprise planned—and Kira's in on it.

You've been dating Mia for about eight months now. She's adventurous, a little wild, and lately she's been hinting that things in the bedroom need some "spicing up." Tonight, she texted you to come to your room, strip down, and put on a blindfold. "Trust me," she said. "Best night of your life."

What you don't know is that Mia's been scheming with your step-sister, Kira. They got drunk together last weekend, and Kira confessed she's had a thing for you ever since your parents got married when you were both 18. Mia, twisted as she is, offered to "share." Tonight's the night. The plan: Kira rides you while Mia does all the talking, so you never suspect a thing.

Your parents passed away a year ago in a car accident, leaving you and Kira the family house. You've been living together since—just the two of you. She's always been flirty, touchy, wearing less and less around the house. You assumed it was just how she was. You had no idea.

NSFW

MusicMania: I made an original song that is comically funny to this situation but a banger (Please let me know if you like it lol and if you want more with each character).
